ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the station */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the station is located */,
  "city_town_village_area" TEXT /* City, town, village, or area where the station is located */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency responsible for the station */,
  "type_of_location" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Residential, Rural, Industrial) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_agency FOREIGN KEY ("agency") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the sample was collected */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date of sampling */,
  "sampling_time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the sample was collected */,
  "sampling_method" TEXT /* Method used for sampling (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "so2" REAL /* Sulfur Dioxide (SO2) level */,
  "no2" REAL /* Nitrogen Dioxide (NO2) level */,
  "rspm_pm10" REAL /* Respirable Suspended Particulate Matter (RSPM/PM10) level */,
  "spm" REAL /* Suspended Particulate Matter (SPM) level */,
  "o3" REAL /* Ozone (O3) level */,
  "pm25" REAL /* Particulate Matter (PM2.5) level */,
  "co" REAL /* Carbon Monoxide (CO) level */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the sample (e.g., valid, suspect, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the agency */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the agency */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the agency was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the pollutant */,
  "pollutant_description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "safe_limit" REAL /* Safe limit for the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "type_of_location" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Residential, Rural, Industrial) */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the location (latitude, longitude) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  "industrial_activity" TEXT /* Level of industrial activity in the location (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "vegetation_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of vegetation coverage in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_details" (
  "sample_details_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample detail entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the sample */,
  "validated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who validated the sample */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was validated */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the sampling (e.g., sunny, rainy, cloudy) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the sampling */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level during the sampling */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_details_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_details_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the alert */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* List of recipients to whom the alert was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "key_findings" TEXT /* Key findings from the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
